name: catalyst-by-zoho
description: AI agent skill for Catalyst by Zoho — full-stack serverless cloud platform. Covers all services, SDKs, CLI, architecture patterns, pricing, migration guides, and Zoho MCP tool-based resource management.

catalyst-by-zoho._setup: Get your URL from https://mcp.zoho.com → select your MCP server → click connect from side menu → copy the authenticated URL. Format: https://<server-name>-<org-id>.zohomcp.com/mcp/<auth-token>/message
